uplink.description: TTN example 1: full payload (flags=0x0003) — hydrostatic pressure 0.2461 bar (24.6094 kPa), 25.6719 C, battery 3.199 V
uplink._note: Oracle: reference/upstream-codec.js yields pressure 0.24609375 bar, temperature 25.671875 C, battery 3.199 V. bar->kPa (x100, round 4); degC and V unchanged. Satisfies groundwater atLeastOne via water.pressure.

uplink._note: Oracle: in-bounds words crafted so reference/upstream-codec.js yields pressure 2.000091552734375 bar, temperature 20.0 C, battery 3.6 V.

uplink.description: Synthetic pressure block only (flags=0x0001): negative -0.5001 bar -> sub-atmospheric, -5.0 C

warnings: hydrostatic pressure -50.0153 kPa is negative (sub-atmospheric); reported as waterPressureKpa

uplink._note: Oracle: upstream yields -0.500152587890625 bar (the -1-10 variant reads sub-atmospheric). water.pressure has a vocabulary minimum of 0, so the negative reading is surfaced as the camelCase extra waterPressureKpa with a warning; water.temperature.current still satisfies the temperature mapping.

uplink.description: TTN example 2 / battery-only payload (flags=0x0002): battery 3.199 V

Header version byte must be 2 (Decentlab protocol v2).
